response.justification: The candidate has strong general software engineering experience and familiarity with Java (noted in skills) but lacks depth in enterprise JVM tooling, IDE internals, or JVM-specific frameworks like Spring/Kotlin. Their background is heavily skewed toward web and mobile development with niche languages (D, TypeScript) rather than enterprise Java/Kotlin ecosystems or IDE tooling. Their passion for tooling and IDEs is not clearly demonstrated in the resume.
strengths: Strong background in software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Versatile full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
concerns: No explicit experience with Spring, Kotlin, or enterprise JVM frameworks
No evidence of work on IDE internals, language tooling, or developer-experience optimization
Resume heavily focused on web/mobile development rather than enterprise JVM tooling
